ddls:
CREATE TABLE "officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "legal_name" TEXT /* Full name of the official */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the official (e.g., Dr, Mr, Ms) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the official */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the official */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the official */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the official */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the official */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the official */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "organisation_name" TEXT /* Full name of the party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the party */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Ideology of the party */,
  "founder" TEXT /* Founder of the party */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Founding date of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Position title within the party */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of affiliation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_affiliations_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_affiliations_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "government_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "organisation_name" TEXT /* Full name of the entity */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., province, municipality, national department) */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* ID of the province (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of position (e.g., elected, appointed, committee member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "official_positions" (
  "official_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official position */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_official_positions_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_official_positions_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the committee */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of committee (e.g., portfolio, select, ad-hoc) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_members" (
  "committee_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee member */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of membership */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of membership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_members_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_members_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislatures" (
  "legislature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislature */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "legislature_name" TEXT /* Name of the legislature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the legislature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legislature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "national_departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "minister_id" INTEGER /* ID of the minister */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ministers" (
  "minister_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each minister */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official */,
  "portfolio" TEXT /* Portfolio of the minister */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Appointment date of the minister */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("minister_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ministers_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deputy_ministers" (
  "deputy_minister_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deputy minister */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official */,
  "portfolio" TEXT /* Portfolio of the deputy minister */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Appointment date of the deputy minister */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deputy_minister_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deputy_ministers_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parliamentarians" (
  "parliamentarian_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parliamentarian */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party */,
  "constituency" TEXT /* Constituency of the parliamentarian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parliamentarian_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parliamentarians_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parliamentarians_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "senators" (
  "senator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each senator */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* ID of the province */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Appointment date of the senator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("senator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_senators_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_senators_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provincial_legislatures" (
  "legislature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislature */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "legislature_name" TEXT /* Name of the legislature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the legislature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legislature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "municipalities" (
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each municipality */,
  "municipality_name" TEXT /* Name of the municipality */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* ID of the province */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of municipality (e.g., metropolitan, district, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the province */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)
column_names: Title of the official (e.g., Dr, Mr, Ms)
Date of birth of the official
Type of entity (e.g., province, municipality, national department)
Type of position (e.g., elected, appointed, committee member)
Unique identifier for each official position
Type of committee (e.g., portfolio, select, ad-hoc)
Unique identifier for each committee member
Unique identifier for each deputy minister
Appointment date of the deputy minister
Type of municipality (e.g., metropolitan, district, local)
